scripts.setup: [[ "$CONDUCTOR_PORT" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] || exit 1 && mkdir -p .vercel && echo '{"projectId":"prj_MtFEiGJYPNEb5KaBhGeCVNg1czWJ","orgId":"team_fd2AWh9hEaC9t7oQA5W3wGXd"}' > .vercel/project.json && vercel env pull .env.local --environment development --scope celn --yes && (grep -q '^APP_URL=' .env.local && sed -i '' "s|^APP_URL=.*|APP_URL=\"http://localhost:$CONDUCTOR_PORT\"|" .env.local || echo "APP_URL=\"http://localhost:$CONDUCTOR_PORT\"" >> .env.local) && npm install
